name: @intentsolutionsio/unit-test-generator
description: Automatically generate comprehensive unit tests from source code with multiple testing framework support

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install unit-test-generator\\n  or /plugin install unit-test-generator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
